[ F15 (2) The applicant must include in the application—


at which the respondent may be served. ]


(3) Paragraph (2) does not apply where an order made by the court under rule 6.19 (service by an alternative method or at an alternative place) specifies the place or method of service of the application.


Textual Amendments


F15 Rule 6.10(2) substituted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 13 (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### Service of the application on a solicitor within the jurisdiction F16 ... E+W


6.11. —(1) Where a solicitor acting for the respondent has notified the applicant in writing that the solicitor is instructed by the respondent to accept service of the application on behalf of the respondent at a business address within the jurisdiction, the application must be served at the business address of that solicitor.


F17 (2) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


(“Solicitor” has the extended meaning set out in rule 6.2 F18 ....)


Textual Amendments


F16 Words in rule 6.11 heading omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 6(2)(a) (with reg. 22 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(a) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
